item.name: Wind-up Moogle
item.description:
With its button nose and fluffy pom, this clockwork moogle will make you the envy of all your friends.

Use item to acquire the wind-up moogle minion.
item.tooltip:
What the moogles lack in
grace, they amply make
up for in wit.
  - Jehantel
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 to all enemies within range.
